AI Spend Console

Project settings + operations

Current mode

Static dashboard

The console is already structured like a real admin product, so later we can plug in live automations without redesigning the shell.

RT-AI operations console

Finance, vendors, imports, review, and reporting in one surface.

Live static export
OverviewTransactionsVendorsAutomationsSettingsStatic export

Vendors

Vendor registry and charge health

Every supplier now has recurring state, invoice source, parsing confidence, and an operator-facing status so you can see where the system is solid and where it still needs supervision.

Healthy

Email-backed recurring vendors with high confidence and predictable billing cadence.

Watch

Imported or recurring vendors that still drift enough to deserve periodic review.

Manual

Vendors still maintained by hand until we connect them to deterministic imports or direct APIs.
